/// Returns a RAG hex colour string based on the measure value and direction.
/// - Positive (normal) or Negative (inverse) → Green  #00C853
/// - Negative (normal) or Positive (inverse) → Red    #D50000
/// - Blank / zero → Amber #FFC107
/// direction values treated as inverse: INVERSE, INVERT, NEG, LOWER_IS_BETTER, TRUE, YES, 1
function 'udf.adaptfy.color.ragHex' =
		( BaseMeasure : ANYREF EXPR, Direction : STRING ) =>
		VAR MeasureValue       = BaseMeasure
		VAR DirectionNormalised = UPPER ( TRIM ( Direction ) )
		VAR ColourAmber        = "#FFC107"
		VAR ColourGreen        = "#00C853"
		VAR ColourRed          = "#D50000"
		VAR IsInverted =
		    SWITCH (
		        DirectionNormalised,
		        "INVERSE",         TRUE(),
		        "INVERT",          TRUE(),
		        "NEG",             TRUE(),
		        "LOWER_IS_BETTER", TRUE(),
		        "TRUE",            TRUE(),
		        "YES",             TRUE(),
		        "1",               TRUE(),
		        FALSE()
		    )
		RETURN
		    IF (
		        IsInverted,
		        SWITCH ( TRUE(), ISBLANK ( MeasureValue ), ColourAmber, MeasureValue < 0, ColourGreen, MeasureValue > 0, ColourRed,   ColourAmber ),
		        SWITCH ( TRUE(), ISBLANK ( MeasureValue ), ColourAmber, MeasureValue > 0, ColourGreen, MeasureValue < 0, ColourRed,   ColourAmber )
		    )
	lineageTag: 4fccc840-4a62-44c2-b194-3cdd191a1206

/// Returns the Same Period Last Year value, delta, or % change for any base measure over a date column.
/// Outcome selector: SPLY, DELTA (or SPLY_DELTA), PCT (or SPLY% or SPLY-PCT).
function 'udf.adaptfy.timeintellgence' =
		( BaseMeasure : ANYREF EXPR, DateColumn : ANYREF EXPR, Outcome : STRING ) =>
		VAR OutcomeNormalised = UPPER ( Outcome )
		VAR PriorYearValue   = CALCULATE ( BaseMeasure, SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR ( DateColumn ) )
		VAR AbsoluteDelta    = BaseMeasure - PriorYearValue
		VAR PercentDelta     = DIVIDE ( AbsoluteDelta, PriorYearValue )
		RETURN
		    SWITCH (
		        OutcomeNormalised,
		        "SPLY",       PriorYearValue,
		        "SPLY_DELTA", AbsoluteDelta,
		        "DELTA",      AbsoluteDelta,
		        "SPLY-PCT",   PercentDelta,
		        "SPLY%",      PercentDelta,
		        "PCT",        PercentDelta,
		        BLANK()
		    )
	lineageTag: a0c44715-8baa-4fca-a5fa-eb91d8fd82cc

/// Returns a self-contained SVG trend icon with RAG colouring.
/// - Positive (normal) or Negative (inverse) → Green UP trend arrow
/// - Negative (normal) or Positive (inverse) → Red DOWN trend arrow
/// - Blank / zero → Amber NEUTRAL horizontal dash
/// Same direction/inversion logic as udf.adaptfy.color.ragHex.
/// SizePx sets the rendered pixel dimensions (default 48). viewBox fixed at 0 0 48 48.
/// Output is a data URI string. Set dataCategory=ImageUrl on the calling measure.
function 'udf.adaptfy.svg.ragArrow' = ```
		
		( BaseMeasure : ANYREF EXPR, Direction : STRING, SizePx : DOUBLE, Style : STRING ) =>
		
		VAR MeasureValue        = BaseMeasure
		VAR DirectionNormalised = UPPER ( TRIM ( Direction ) )
		VAR StyleNormalised     = UPPER ( TRIM ( Style ) )
		VAR PixelSize           = FORMAT ( SizePx, "0" )
		
		VAR IsInverted =
		    SWITCH (
		        DirectionNormalised,
		        "INVERSE",         TRUE(),
		        "INVERT",          TRUE(),
		        "NEG",             TRUE(),
		        "LOWER_IS_BETTER", TRUE(),
		        "TRUE",            TRUE(),
		        "YES",             TRUE(),
		        "1",               TRUE(),
		        FALSE()
		    )
		
		// ── RAG colours ─────────────────────────────────────────────
		// Inversion flips which colour is "good" (green) vs "bad" (red).
		// Arrow/triangle direction is NOT affected — it always follows value sign.
		VAR ColourPositive = IF ( IsInverted, "%23D50000", "%2300C853" )  -- red if inverted, else green
		VAR ColourNegative = IF ( IsInverted, "%2300C853", "%23D50000" )  -- green if inverted, else red
		VAR ColourNeutral  = "%23FFC107"                                   -- amber always
		
		// ── SVG wrapper ─────────────────────────────────────────────
		// Outer SVG sets the canvas Power BI uses for the image cell.
		// Inner SVG maps the fixed 48-unit design space to that canvas.
		VAR SvgWrapperStart =
		    "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='" & PixelSize & "' height='" & PixelSize & "'>" &
		    "<svg x='0' y='0' width='" & PixelSize & "' height='" & PixelSize & "' viewBox='0 0 48 48' fill='none'>"
		VAR SvgWrapperEnd = "</svg></svg>"
		
		// ── ARROW style ─────────────────────────────────────────────
		// Rising trend line with top-right corner bracket
		VAR ArrowUp =
		    "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SvgWrapperStart &
		    "<path d='M40.9999 27.0005V15.0005H29' stroke='" & ColourPositive & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
		    "<path d='M6 37L16.3385 24.5L26.1846 30.5L41 15' stroke='" & ColourPositive & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
		    SvgWrapperEnd
		
		// Falling trend line with bottom-right corner bracket
		VAR ArrowDown =
		    "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SvgWrapperStart &
		    "<path d='M29 34.9999H41V23' stroke='" & ColourNegative & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
		    "<path d='M6 13L16.3385 25.5L26.1846 19.5L41 35' stroke='" & ColourNegative & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
		    SvgWrapperEnd
		
		// ── TRIANGLE style ───────────────────────────────────────────
		// Solid filled upward triangle — apex (24,8)  base (6,40)-(42,40)
		VAR TriangleUp =
		    "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SvgWrapperStart &
		    "<polygon points='24,8 6,40 42,40' fill='" & ColourPositive & "'/>" &
		    SvgWrapperEnd
		
		// Solid filled downward triangle — apex (24,40)  base (6,8)-(42,8)
		VAR TriangleDown =
		    "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SvgWrapperStart &
		    "<polygon points='24,40 6,8 42,8' fill='" & ColourNegative & "'/>" &
		    SvgWrapperEnd
		
		// ── NEUTRAL ─ shared across both styles ─────────────────────
		// Simple horizontal dash centred on canvas (amber, never inverted)
		VAR NeutralDash =
		    "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SvgWrapperStart &
		    "<line x1='10' y1='24' x2='38' y2='24' stroke='" & ColourNeutral & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/>" &
		    SvgWrapperEnd
		
		// ── Icon selection ───────────────────────────────────────────
		VAR IconUp      = IF ( StyleNormalised = "TRIANGLE", TriangleUp,   ArrowUp   )
		VAR IconDown    = IF ( StyleNormalised = "TRIANGLE", TriangleDown, ArrowDown )
		VAR IconNeutral = NeutralDash
		
		// Direction of icon always follows value sign — IsInverted only affected colours above
		RETURN
		    SWITCH ( TRUE(),
		        ISBLANK ( MeasureValue ), IconNeutral,
		        MeasureValue = 0,         IconNeutral,
		        MeasureValue > 0,         IconUp,
		                                  IconDown
		    )
		
		```
	lineageTag: 3d29a004-2002-4e09-bca5-9316579e3255

	/// Customer age grouped into bands for demographic analysis: 18-29, 30-44, 45-59, 60-74, 75+.
	column 'Age Band' =
			SWITCH(
			    TRUE(),
			    Customer[Age] >= 18 && Customer[Age] <= 29, "18-29",
			    Customer[Age] >= 30 && Customer[Age] <= 44, "30-44",
			    Customer[Age] >= 45 && Customer[Age] <= 59, "45-59",

			    Customer[Age] >= 75,                        "75+",
			    "Unknown"

		summarizeBy: none
		sortByColumn: 'Age Band Sort'

	column 'Age Band Sort' =
			SWITCH(
			    TRUE(),
			    Customer[Age] >= 18 && Customer[Age] <= 29, 1,
			    Customer[Age] >= 30 && Customer[Age] <= 44, 2,
			    Customer[Age] >= 45 && Customer[Age] <= 59, 3,
			    Customer[Age] >= 60 && Customer[Age] <= 74, 4,

		level Continent

/// Central fact table. One row per order line. Transactional data with quantities, prices, costs, dates, and FK keys to all dimensions.

	/// Net revenue from sales: SUMX of Sales[Quantity] * Sales[Net Price] in current filter context.
	measure 'Net Revenue' =
			
			SUMX( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[Net Price] )
		formatString: #,0
		lineageTag: 7c5f9a14-3465-43ab-b1e5-aeb03f4fe8ad

		changedProperty = FormatString

	/// Total cost of goods sold: SUMX of Sales[Quantity] * Sales[Unit Cost] in current filter context.
	measure Cost =
			
			SUMX( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[Unit Cost] )
		formatString: #,0
		lineageTag: 416604ca-8ec2-48fb-97e3-568ef1a0c264

		changedProperty = FormatString

	/// Net profit in absolute value: Net Revenue minus Cost. As COGS is the only expense in this model this represents the net profit.
	measure 'Net Profit' =
			
			[Net Revenue] - [Cost]
		formatString: #,0
		lineageTag: e22dbc08-3844-485a-96d6-625d9d77e004

		changedProperty = FormatString

	/// Net profit margin %: DIVIDE([Net Profit], [Net Revenue]). Represents the share of net revenue retained as profit after deducting cost of goods.

			VAR MarginNow    = [Margin %]

	/// Dynamic Y-axis minimum for Margin % chart. Pads below the visible minimum by 50% of the visible range (min 0.5pp), then rounds down to the nearest 0.5pp. Use in a What-if parameter or axis min reference line.
	measure 'Margin % Axis Min' =
			VAR VisibleMin    = MINX( VALUES( 'Date'[Year Month Number] ), [Margin %] )
			VAR VisibleMax    = MAXX( VALUES( 'Date'[Year Month Number] ), [Margin %] )
			VAR VisibleRange  = VisibleMax - VisibleMin
			VAR Padding       = MAX( VisibleRange * 0.5, 0.005 )  -- at least 0.5pp padding each side
			RETURN
			    FLOOR( ( VisibleMin - Padding ) * 100, 0.5 ) / 100
		formatString: 0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%
		displayFolder: Formatting - Examples
		lineageTag: 16a42d36-6622-455a-9708-1a621e589ce2

	/// Dynamic Y-axis maximum for Margin % chart. Pads above the visible maximum by 50% of the visible range (min 0.5pp), then rounds up to the nearest 0.5pp. Use in a What-if parameter or axis max reference line.

			VAR VisibleMin    = MINX( VALUES( 'Date'[Year Month Number] ), [Margin %] )

			VAR VisibleRange  = VisibleMax - VisibleMin
			VAR Padding       = MAX( VisibleRange * 0.5, 0.005 )  -- at least 0.5pp padding each side
			RETURN

	/// Dynamic format string for use as the Display Units field in a Power BI visual. Uses SELECTEDMEASURE() to read the value at render time and returns the correct compact scale format string. Safeguards: blank returns empty string, zero returns integer. Scale: T=trillions (4 commas), B=billions (3), M=millions (2), K=thousands (1). Below 100: increasing decimal precision.
	measure 'Format string' =
			VAR __Value = ABS( SELECTEDMEASURE() )
			RETURN
			    SWITCH(
			        TRUE(),
			        ISBLANK( SELECTEDMEASURE() ), "",
			        SELECTEDMEASURE() = 0,        "#,0",
			        __Value >= 1E12,              "#,0,,,,.0T",
			        __Value >= 1E9,               "#,0,,,.0B",
			        __Value >= 1E6,               "#,0,,.0M",
			        __Value >= 1E3,               "#,0,.0K",
			        __Value >= 100,               "#,0",
			        __Value >= 10,                "#,0.0",
			        __Value >= 1,                 "#,0.00",
			                                      "#,0.000"
			    )
		displayFolder: KPI - Sales
		lineageTag: a4dd584b-f6d8-4593-b16d-1df627d45aae

	/// Displays the selected date range and its SPLY comparison as a readable label. Returns 'All periods selected' when no date filter is applied. Otherwise adapts to any filter context: single month (Jun 2023), same-year range (Jan - Mar 2023), cross-year range (Oct 2022 - Mar 2023), or full year (Jan - Dec 2023). Use in a Card visual as a dynamic period context label.
	measure 'Selected Period vs SPLY' =
			VAR _TotalDates    = CALCULATE( COUNTROWS( 'Date' ), ALL( 'Date' ) )
			VAR _SelectedDates = COUNTROWS( 'Date' )
			VAR _AllSelected   = _SelectedDates = _TotalDates
			VAR _MinDate       = MIN( 'Date'[Date] )
			VAR _MaxDate       = MAX( 'Date'[Date] )
			VAR _MinSPLY       = DATE( YEAR( _MinDate ) - 1, MONTH( _MinDate ), DAY( _MinDate ) )
			VAR _MaxSPLY       = DATE( YEAR( _MaxDate ) - 1, MONTH( _MaxDate ), DAY( _MaxDate ) )
			VAR _SameMonth     = MONTH( _MinDate ) = MONTH( _MaxDate ) && YEAR( _MinDate ) = YEAR( _MaxDate )
			VAR _SameYear      = YEAR( _MinDate ) = YEAR( _MaxDate )
			VAR _Current =
			    IF( _SameMonth,
			        FORMAT( _MinDate, "MMM YYYY" ),
			        IF( _SameYear,
			            FORMAT( _MinDate, "MMM" ) & " - " & FORMAT( _MaxDate, "MMM YYYY" ),
			            FORMAT( _MinDate, "MMM YYYY" ) & " - " & FORMAT( _MaxDate, "MMM YYYY" )
			        )
			    )
			VAR _SPLY =
			    IF( _SameMonth,
			        FORMAT( _MinSPLY, "MMM YYYY" ),
			        IF( _SameYear,
			            FORMAT( _MinSPLY, "MMM" ) & " - " & FORMAT( _MaxSPLY, "MMM YYYY" ),
			            FORMAT( _MinSPLY, "MMM YYYY" ) & " - " & FORMAT( _MaxSPLY, "MMM YYYY" )
			        )
			    )
			RETURN
			    IF(
			        _AllSelected,
			        "All periods selected",
			        _Current & "  |  vs.  " & _SPLY
			    )
		displayFolder: KPI - Sales
		lineageTag: 46fbd696-dac1-4b4d-9926-0ee53235c9d6
